errors.evidence: Error in code parsing: Your code snippet is invalid, because the regex pattern ```(?:py|python)?\n(.*?)\n``` was not found in it.
errors.description: The agent generated a code response that did not conform to the required format (missing code block delimiters), causing a parsing error during execution.
errors.impact: Prevented proper tool execution and required manual intervention to correct the code format.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Single critical formatting error caused execution failure, though the underlying reasoning was correct.
scores.security_reasoning: No security-related issues identified in the trace.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Failed to produce properly formatted code output as required by the task instructions.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: The plan was logically sound but execution was blocked by a formatting error, indicating inefficiency in code generation.
